overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a rainy industrial area at night, entering a control room filled with monitors and computer equipment, exploring the interior, and exiting back to the exterior. The scene features neon lighting, wet reflective surfaces, and futuristic industrial architecture with prominent Delamain corporate signage.

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a rainy industrial loading bay at night, passing cargo containers and machinery. Neon signs including prominent Delamain corporate signage illuminate the wet concrete. A character in distinctive yellow and black pants stands near the entrance as the player approaches the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit security control room with monitors

agents.ego_description: walking through doorway into control room and observing the monitor arrays

rotating ceiling fan with multiple blades

arrays of glowing blue monitors on desks

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dimly lit control room from the rainy exterior. The space features server racks with red lights, multiple computer workstations with glowing blue screens, and large windows with horizontal blinds. Ceiling fans rotate overhead as the player moves deeper into the room.

segments.scene_description: The player explores the control room's interior, focusing on detailed computer workstations with multiple glowing monitors. Close-up views reveal desk items including an orange tape dispenser and scattered papers. The camera pans across the room showing different angles of the equipment and window blinds.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from control room to exterior loading bay

exiting control room back to rainy industrial exterior

rain-slicked ground reflecting the exterior lights

segments.scene_description: The player moves toward the exit, passing a character working at a computer station inside the control room. Exiting the building, the scene transitions back to the rainy industrial loading bay with blue cargo containers and wet pavement visible through the doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rainy industrial exterior into a high-tech control room and back out into the night. It begins in a wet loading bay, moving past cargo containers and glowing Delamain corporate signage toward a character in yellow and black pants standing by a building entrance. As the camera crosses the threshold, the environment shifts from the rainy open air to a dimly lit interior filled with rotating ceiling fans, red-lit server racks, and workstations with glowing blue screens. The perspective then lingers on the detailed clutter of the desks, including an orange tape dispenser and scattered papers, before panning across the room's monitors and window blinds. Finally, the camera moves past a worker at a computer station and exits the building, transitioning back to the blue cargo containers and reflective wet pavement of the industrial bay.
